name: Diabetic Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. Add butter, eggs, sugar substitute, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Blend well until combined.
3. Stir in grated apple and walnuts.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
Food Exchange per Serving: 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE + 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FRUIT EXCHANGE
Source: The Big Fat Red Juicy Apple Cook Book, brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master.
